name: codefresh-actions-migrator
description: Convert local Codefresh pipelines into GitHub Actions workflows with deterministic mappings and Copilot-assisted review.

chatParticipants.name: cfmigrator
chatParticipants.description: Plan and explain Codefresh to GitHub Actions migrations.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan the workspace for Codefresh pipeline files.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Plan a migration for a Codefresh pipeline.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow from a Codefresh pipeline.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain mapped steps, warnings, and manual follow-ups.

disambiguation.description: The user wants to convert Codefresh pipeline YAML to GitHub Actions workflows.
examples: Convert this codefresh.yml to GitHub Actions
Plan a migration from Codefresh to GitHub Actions
Explain how this Codefresh pipeline maps to Actions

languageModelTools.name: scan_codefresh_pipelines
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find Codefresh pipeline YAML files in the workspace.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find local Codefresh pipeline YAML files in the current VS Code workspace.

languageModelTools.name: plan_codefresh_migration
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a migration plan for a Codefresh pipeline.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a deterministic migration plan for a local Codefresh pipeline file.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to a Codefresh YAML file.

languageModelTools.name: validate_github_workflow
languageModelTools.userDescription: Validate generated GitHub Actions workflow YAML.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validate GitHub Actions workflow YAML shape for required top-level fields.
